raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The open-ended request invites assessment of whether the protocol description and resulting interpretation form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical claims about accuracy, chance level, and correlation, so judging whether those claims are supported by the reported results is central.","R1.6":"The passage has visible sentence-level repetition and flow issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility for a general reaction.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague request should preserve uncertainty about the intended depth of feedback.","RX.2":"The evaluator should avoid treating the reported numbers or correlation as stronger than the artifact itself establishes.","RX.3":"The delegation asks only for an opinion on the artifact, so staying within assessment rather than rewriting or executing changes is load-bearing.","RX.4":"Feedback should avoid encouraging misleading empirical interpretation or unsupported research claims.","RX.5":"Assessment should remain traceable to the specific claims and wording present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: The open-ended request invites assessment of whether the protocol description and resulting interpretation form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical claims about accuracy, chance level, and correlation, so judging whether those claims are supported by the reported results is central.
rationale.R1.6: The passage has visible sentence-level repetition and flow issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility for a general reaction.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague request should preserve uncertainty about the intended depth of feedback.
rationale.RX.2: The evaluator should avoid treating the reported numbers or correlation as stronger than the artifact itself establishes.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation asks only for an opinion on the artifact, so staying within assessment rather than rewriting or executing changes is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.4: Feedback should avoid encouraging misleading empirical interpretation or unsupported research claims.
rationale.RX.5: Assessment should remain traceable to the specific claims and wording present in the artifact.
